nodes.name: Wikipedia and Wikibooks
aliases: English and Simple Wikipedia and Wikibooks

nodes.name: The Stack v2 train smol ids

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage 1 pretraining used Dolma 3 Mix, the 6T-token natural-data pretraining mix for OLMo 3 Base.

evidence.excerpt: We first train Olmo 3 Base on Dolma 3 Mix, our 6T token pretraining data mix.
evidence.explanation: Directly identifies Dolma 3 Mix as the first-stage pretraining data for OLMo 3 Base.

evidence.excerpt: Dolma 3 Mix, a diverse 5.9T-token pre-training dataset
evidence.explanation: Confirms the released Dolma 3 Mix artifact and its role as OLMo 3 pretraining data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Common Crawl web pages are the largest Dolma 3 Mix leaf source for stage-1 pretraining: 4.51T tokens, 76.1% of the 6T mix, from 104 dumps with cutoff Dec. 31, 2024.

evidence.excerpt: Common Crawl Web pages ... 4.51T (76.1%)
evidence.explanation: Table 4 lists Common Crawl as a component of the final Dolma 3 Mix used for training.

evidence.excerpt: We start with 104 dumps from the CommonCrawl corpus, with a cutoff date of December 31, 2024.
evidence.explanation: Specifies the Common Crawl source pool used to create the web-data leaf.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: olmOCR science PDFs fed multiple OLMo 3 Base stages: 805B tokens in Dolma 3 Mix pretraining, an HQ subset in Dolmino midtraining, and the natural long-document backbone for Longmino long-context extension.

evidence.excerpt: olmOCR science PDFs Academic documents ... 805B (13.6%)
evidence.explanation: Table 4 lists olmOCR science PDFs as a leaf source in the pretraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: The backbone of our long-context data pool is scientific PDFs scraped from the web and processed by olmOCR.
evidence.explanation: Shows the same PDF collection was the backbone of the long-context training pool.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stack-Edu Rebalanced supplied GitHub-code pretraining data, contributing 409B tokens (6.89%) to the 6T Dolma 3 Mix.

evidence.excerpt: Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code ... 409B (6.89%)
evidence.explanation: Table 4 names Stack-Edu as a code leaf in the final pretraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: For code data, we use Stack-Edu ... an improved curation of GitHub repositories from the-stack-v2 dataset
evidence.explanation: Confirms the Stack-Edu artifact and its source role.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The pretraining mix included the arXiv/LaTeX-paper source, documented as arXiv documents from Proof-Pile-2, with 50.8B tokens in the 6T mix.

evidence.excerpt: arXiv Papers with LaTeX ... 50.8B (0.86%)
evidence.explanation: Table 4 lists arXiv papers as a Dolma 3 Mix leaf source.

evidence.excerpt: we include arXiv documents from the Proof-Pile-2 dataset
evidence.explanation: Resolves the arXiv leaf to Proof-Pile-2 as the upstream released dataset.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: FineMath 3+ math web pages were part of stage-1 Dolma 3 Mix pretraining, contributing 152B tokens (2.56%).

evidence.excerpt: FineMath 3+ Math web pages ... 152B (2.56%)
evidence.explanation: Table 4 lists FineMath 3+ as a leaf source of the pretraining data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Wikipedia and Wikibooks supplied encyclopedic data to the Dolma 3 Mix pretraining stage, contributing 2.51B tokens.

evidence.excerpt: Wikipedia & Wikibooks Encyclopedic ... 2.51B (0.04%)
evidence.explanation: Table 4 lists Wikipedia and Wikibooks as a pretraining leaf source.

evidence.excerpt: we include the Wikipedia and Wikibooks sources from Dolma
evidence.explanation: Confirms these encyclopedia sources were included.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage 2 midtraining continued OLMo 3 Base on Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix for about 100B tokens; the same mix also supplied the 66% short-context component during the stage-3 long-context extension.

evidence.excerpt: During this midtrain stage, we use 100B high-quality tokens ... Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
evidence.explanation: Directly states that Dolmino Mix was the 100B-token midtraining data.

evidence.excerpt: We mix 34% long-context data with 66% high-quality short-context data sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix
evidence.explanation: Shows Dolmino Mix also entered the long-context extension mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: TinyMATH Mind was a synthetic math midtraining leaf in Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix: 898M tokens (0.9%) of the 100B mix.

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) TinyMATH Mind** ... 898M (0.9%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists TinyMATH Mind as a source in the midtraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: TinyMATH PoT was a synthetic math midtraining leaf in Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix: 241M tokens (0.24%) of the 100B mix.

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) TinyMATH PoT** ... 241M (0.24%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists TinyMATH PoT as a source in the midtraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneMath was included as a synthetic math midtraining source, contributing 5.62B tokens (5.63%) to Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) CraneMath* ... 5.62B (5.63%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists CraneMath as a leaf of the final midtraining data mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: MegaMatt was included as a synthetic math midtraining source, contributing 1.73B tokens (1.73%) to Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) MegaMatt* ... 1.73B (1.73%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists MegaMatt as a leaf source in the midtraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The final midtraining mix reused the OLMo 2 Dolmino Mix Math subset, after additional decontamination filtering, contributing 10.7B tokens.

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) Dolmino Mathˆˆ ... 10.7B (10.7%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Dolmino Math in the final Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: We include the entirety of the 10.7B-token OLMo 2 Dolmino Mix Math subset.
evidence.explanation: Confirms the Dolmino Math source and the decontaminated reuse.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The midtraining mix included a quality-filtered Stack-Edu FIM code source, with 50% fill-in-the-middle-transformed documents and 10.0B training tokens.

evidence.excerpt: Code StackEdu (FIM)ˆ ... 10.0B (10.0%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists StackEdu (FIM) as a source in the midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: 50% of documents reflect fill-in-the-middle (FIM) transformation
evidence.explanation: Describes the transformation applied to this Stack-Edu midtraining leaf.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneCode was a synthetic Python/code midtraining source in Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, contributing 10.0B tokens (10.0%).

evidence.excerpt: Python (synth) CraneCode* ... 10.0B (10.0%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists CraneCode as a midtraining data source.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Reddit To Flashcards was a synthetic QA midtraining source, contributing 5.90B tokens (5.9%) to Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: QA (synth) Reddit To Flashcards** ... 5.90B (5.9%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Reddit To Flashcards as a source in the midtraining mix.

edges.description: Wiki To RCQA was a synthetic QA/reading-comprehension source in Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, contributing 3.0B tokens.

evidence.excerpt: QA (synth) Wiki To RCQA** ... 3.0B (3.0%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Wiki To RCQA as a source in the midtraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Dolmino midtraining mix included the diverse-QA-pairs synthetic subset of Nemotron CC, contributing 5.0B tokens.

evidence.excerpt: QA (synth) Nemotron Synth QAˆ ... 5.0B (5.0%)

evidence.excerpt: We include the “diverse QA pairs” synth subset of the Nemotron CC dataset

edges.description: Math Meta-Reasoning was included as a synthetic thinking-trace midtraining source, contributing 381M tokens.

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Math Meta-Reasoning** ... 381M (0.38%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Math Meta-Reasoning as a midtraining leaf.

edges.description: Gemini Reasoning Traces were included as a thinking-trace midtraining source, contributing 246M tokens.

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Gemini Reasoning Tracesˆ ... 246M (0.25%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Gemini Reasoning Traces as a midtraining source.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Llama Nemotron Reasoning Traces were included as a thinking-trace midtraining source, contributing 1.25B tokens.

edges.description: OpenThoughts2 Reasoning Traces were included as a thinking-trace midtraining source, contributing 1.25B tokens.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b

evidence.excerpt: Instruction (synth) Tulu 3 SFTˆˆ ... 1.1B (1.1%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Tulu 3 SFT data as a midtraining source.

evidence.excerpt: We sample instruction data from the SFT set from Tülu 3.
evidence.explanation: Confirms the instruction data came from Tulu 3 SFT.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b

evidence.excerpt: Instruction (synth) Dolmino 1 Flanˆˆ ... 5.0B (5.0%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Dolmino 1 Flan as a midtraining source.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Dolmino 1 Flan source was a subset of the external Flan dataset, with the same preprocessing previously used in OLMo 2.

evidence.excerpt: we also find the Flan dataset ... improves performance in QA tasks, and as a result included a subset of the Flan dataset
evidence.explanation: Directly states that a Flan subset was included in the final midtraining data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: In addition to pretraining and long-context use, a high-quality filtered subset of the olmOCR science PDF pool contributed 4.99B tokens (5.0%) to Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: PDFs olmOCR science PDFs (HQ subset)ˆ ... 4.99B (5.0%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists an HQ subset of olmOCR science PDFs as a midtraining source.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: STEM-Heavy Crawl was a high-quality web midtraining source crawled by Ai2, contributing 4.99B tokens (5.0%).

evidence.excerpt: Web pages STEM-Heavy Crawlˆ ... 4.99B (5.0%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists STEM-Heavy Crawl as a midtraining source.

evidence.excerpt: We also create a separate high-quality web collection, crawled between September 12, 2024 and June 3rd, 2025
evidence.explanation: Describes the source and collection window for STEM-Heavy Crawl.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: A high-quality subset of stage-1 Common Crawl web data was used in midtraining, contributing 22.4B tokens (22.5%) to Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: Web pages Common Crawl (HQ subset)ˆ ... 22.4B (22.5%)
evidence.explanation: Table 5 lists Common Crawl HQ subset as a midtraining source.

evidence.excerpt: Stage 1 web data We sample documents from the top two quality buckets (top 10% quality).
evidence.explanation: Explains the HQ subset construction.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage 3 long-context extension used Dolma 3 Longmino Mix; for OLMo 3 32B, the extension trained for 100B tokens, with 34% long-context data and 66% Dolmino short-context data.

evidence.excerpt: Dolma 3 Longmino Mix consists of over 600 billion tokens; statistics in Table 11.
evidence.explanation: Introduces the long-context mix used for the extension stage.

evidence.excerpt: train using this mix for an additional 50B tokens for Olmo 3 7B and 100B tokens for Olmo 3 32B
evidence.explanation: Specifies that OLMo 3 32B was trained on the Longmino mix for 100B tokens.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Longmino included synthetic Common Word Extraction (CWE) augmentation over olmOCR PDFs; the 50B reference mix used 1.94B CWE tokens, and the 100B 32B mix kept the same proportions.

evidence.excerpt: olmOCR PDFs + synth CWE 32K-64K ... 1.94B (3.88%)
evidence.explanation: Table 11 lists the CWE synthetic leaf of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: The 100B mix for Olmo 3 32B maintains the same proportions as the 50B mix.
evidence.explanation: Shows the CWE proportion applies to the OLMo 3 32B long-context mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Longmino included synthetic Rewriting EXpressions (REX) augmentation over olmOCR PDFs; the 50B reference mix used 6.08B REX tokens, and the 100B 32B mix kept the same proportions.

evidence.excerpt: olmOCR PDFs + synth REX 32K-64K ... 6.08B (12.2%)
evidence.explanation: Table 11 lists the REX synthetic leaf of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: The 100B mix for Olmo 3 32B maintains the same proportions as the 50B mix.
evidence.explanation: Shows the REX proportion applies to the OLMo 3 32B long-context mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Gemma 3 12B was used in the olmOCR science-PDF PII-removal pipeline: it classified each document’s first page for sensitive standalone PII or sensitive linked information, shaping PDF inclusion in OLMo 3 training data.

evidence.excerpt: we classify documents using a prompt to Gemma 3 12B ... to determine if they contain any sensitive standalone PII
evidence.explanation: Directly documents Gemma 3 12B as a filtering model in the PDF data pipeline.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Gemma 3 4B was used in the olmOCR science-PDF PII-removal pipeline to assign document-type flags on the first 5,000 characters; those flags informed filtering rules for PDF training data.

evidence.excerpt: Next, we use Gemma 3 4B on the first 5,000 characters of each document to arrive at a set of flags
evidence.explanation: Directly documents Gemma 3 4B as a classifier/filtering model in the PDF pipeline.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Dolma 3 fastText WebOrganizer topic classifier partitioned web/PDF documents into topic buckets used for Dolma 3 Mix mixing and quality-aware sampling.

evidence.excerpt: huggingface.co/allenai/dolma3-fasttext-weborganizer-topic-classifier
evidence.explanation: The paper footnote identifies the released topic classifier used in the Dolma 3 data pipeline.

evidence.excerpt: we applied data mixing ... across the WebOrganizer topics within the web data and PDF sources
evidence.explanation: Shows the classifier’s topic outputs were used to shape the training mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Dolma 3 fastText quality classifier supplied document-quality scores used for web quality-aware upsampling, Common Crawl HQ selection, and STEM-Heavy Crawl filtering.

evidence.location: Section 3.4.2 footnote and Section 3.5.2, pages 15 and 25
evidence.excerpt: huggingface.co/allenai/dolma3-fasttext-quality-classifier
evidence.explanation: The paper footnote identifies the released quality classifier used in Dolma 3 data processing.

evidence.excerpt: we choose to filter this set using the quality classifier introduced in Section §3.4.1
evidence.explanation: Shows classifier outputs directly affected inclusion of STEM-Heavy Crawl data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen3-32B rewrote FineMath4+ examples into CraneMath, a midtraining source for OLMo 3 32B. The paper describes CraneMath as a Qwen3 rewrite of FineMath4+ using the SwallowMath prompt; the Dolma3 README resolves the generator to Qwen3-32B.

evidence.excerpt: we generate an independent reproduction of SwallowMath by rewriting FineMath4+ ... using Qwen3
evidence.explanation: Documents Qwen3 as the rewriting model for CraneMath.

evidence.excerpt: for CraneMath we used Qwen3-32B for all data generation
evidence.explanation: Resolves the Qwen3 generator to the specific Qwen3-32B model.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: FineMath4+ was the source corpus rewritten into CraneMath, which then entered OLMo 3 32B midtraining.

evidence.location: CraneMath README, Source Materials and Recipe
evidence.excerpt: Base Dataset: [Finemath-4plus] ... Starting with Finemath-4plus ... use Qwen3-32B to rewrite
evidence.explanation: Shows FineMath4+ was the input corpus transformed into CraneMath.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The CraneMath construction recipe explicitly borrowed the SwallowMath prompt/procedure while substituting Qwen3-32B and permissively licensed FineMath4+ inputs.

evidence.location: CraneMath README, Source Materials and Recipe
evidence.excerpt: Inspiration: [SwallowMath] Paper outlining the data generation procedure
evidence.explanation: Shows SwallowMath was a methodological inspiration for CraneMath.

evidence.excerpt: rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt
evidence.explanation: The OLMo 3 paper states the specific SwallowMath prompt was reused.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: MegaMatt was produced by filtering Megamath-Web-Pro data occurring after June 2023 and rewriting it with Qwen3; the resulting MegaMatt data was included in midtraining.

evidence.excerpt: we collect the Megamath-Web-Pro data occurring after June 2023 ... and rewrite it using Qwen3
evidence.explanation: Identifies MegaMath-Web-Pro as the source material transformed into MegaMatt.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct generated the two-stage SGCR/SCOR code rewrites used to create CraneCode, a 10B-token midtraining source.

evidence.excerpt: both using the prompts from the original SwallowCode paper and Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
evidence.explanation: Specifies the model used for CraneCode rewriting.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneCode was built from Python files in The Stack v2 Smol, filtered for compilation/linting and then rewritten; those transformed files entered OLMo 3 midtraining via CraneCode.

evidence.location: Section 3.5.2 and Appendix A.3.2, pages 23 and 92
evidence.excerpt: we source data from the Python subset of the-stack-v2-smol
evidence.explanation: Identifies The Stack v2 Smol as CraneCode’s source data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneCode was explicitly designed as a fully open replica of the SwallowCode recipe, borrowing its prompts and two-stage rewriting pipeline while changing the generator to Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct.

evidence.excerpt: we also created a fully-open replica of SwallowCode ... which we call CraneCode
evidence.explanation: States that CraneCode replicated the SwallowCode methodology.

evidence.excerpt: both using the prompts from the original SwallowCode paper
evidence.explanation: Confirms the specific SwallowCode prompts were reused.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: GPT-4o-mini rewrote Reddit submission-comment pairs into multiple-choice QA flashcards for the Reddit-to-Flashcards midtraining source.

evidence.excerpt: use GPT 4o-mini to rewrite submission-comment pairs ... into multiple-choice QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Directly identifies GPT-4o-mini as the transformer for Reddit-to-Flashcards.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen2.5 32B Instruct generated passage-based QA pairs from Wikipedia passages for the Wiki-to-RCQA midtraining source.

evidence.excerpt: We collect Wikipedia passages and prompted Qwen2.5 32B Instruct to generate QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Directly identifies Qwen2.5 32B Instruct as the generator for Wiki-to-RCQA.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Wikipedia passages were the source texts transformed into Wiki-to-RCQA synthetic QA examples for midtraining.

evidence.excerpt: We collect Wikipedia passages and prompted Qwen2.5 32B Instruct to generate QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Identifies Wikipedia passages as the source material for Wiki-to-RCQA.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: GPT-4.1 generated thinking traces for Math/Code Meta-Reasoning and Program-Verifiable midtraining data, alongside o4-mini.

evidence.excerpt: we prompt GPT-4.1 and o4-mini to generate thinking traces
evidence.explanation: Directly names GPT-4.1 as a generator for meta-reasoning traces.

evidence.excerpt: distill thinking traces from GPT-4.1 and o4-mini models
evidence.explanation: Directly names GPT-4.1 as a distillation model for Program-Verifiable data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: o4-mini generated thinking traces for Math/Code Meta-Reasoning and Program-Verifiable midtraining data, alongside GPT-4.1.

evidence.excerpt: we prompt GPT-4.1 and o4-mini to generate thinking traces
evidence.explanation: Directly names o4-mini as a generator for meta-reasoning traces.

evidence.excerpt: distill thinking traces from GPT-4.1 and o4-mini models
evidence.explanation: Directly names o4-mini as a distillation model for Program-Verifiable data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: GPT-4.1 lightly rewrote OpenMathReasoning items into OMR Full-Thoughts, editing clarity, flow, formatting, and LaTeX while preserving reasoning.

evidence.excerpt: instructing GPT-4.1 to edit items for clarity, flow, and formatting
evidence.explanation: Directly identifies GPT-4.1 as the model used to transform OpenMathReasoning into OMR Full-Thoughts.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OpenMathReasoning was the source for the OMR Full-Thoughts rewrite and for the QwQ reasoning-trace subset included in Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: We also consider 9 different versions of rewriting ... of the OpenMathReasoning dataset
evidence.explanation: Identifies OpenMathReasoning as the source dataset transformed into OMR Full-Thoughts.

evidence.excerpt: QwQ reasoning traces consists of the QwQ subset of the OpenMathReasoning dataset
evidence.explanation: Shows another included Dolmino leaf was a subset of OpenMathReasoning.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The MATH training set seeded TinyMATH: for each of 7,500 MATH training examples, the team generated 100 similar problems plus PoT and MIND variants used in midtraining.

evidence.excerpt: For each of the 7500 examples in the MATH training set, we generate 100 new, similar problems.
evidence.explanation: Shows MATH training examples were source material transformed into TinyMATH data.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The meta-reasoning data construction borrowed the annotation style of Pandalla-Math, using annotations such as problem classification, difficulty analysis, solution approaches, pitfalls, and verification methods.

evidence.excerpt: detailed annotations ... modeled after the Pandalla-Math dataset
evidence.explanation: States the meta-reasoning annotation recipe was modeled after Pandalla-Math.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OLMo 2 Instruct 32B generated all Longmino synthetic CWE and REX aggregation tasks inserted into long-document PDF training examples for the long-context extension stage.

evidence.excerpt: we ultimately use OLMo 2 Instruct 32B for all generations
evidence.explanation: Directly names OLMo 2 Instruct 32B as the generator for Longmino synthetic augmentation.

evidence.excerpt: CWE ... REX ... prompt OLMo 2 Instruct
evidence.explanation: Shows both CWE and REX synthetic tasks were prompted from OLMo 2 Instruct.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OLMo 3 Base was evaluated with OlmoBaseEval, including Base Easy and Base Main suites with 43 tasks spanning math, code, QA, STEM, non-STEM, and held-out benchmarks.

evidence.excerpt: The resulting OlmoBaseEval consists of a Base Easy suite ... and a Base Main suite
evidence.explanation: Identifies the evaluation suite used for base-model development and reporting.

evidence.excerpt: OlmoBaseEval contains 43 tasks
evidence.explanation: Documents the scope of the evaluation suite.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OlmoBaseEval was used to make development decisions in pretraining/midtraining data ablations, including microanneals and integration tests comparing candidate data sources and mixes.

evidence.excerpt: We develop OlmoBaseEval ... to support decision-making during base model development
evidence.explanation: States OlmoBaseEval shaped development decisions, not just final reporting.

evidence.excerpt: We then compare the performance ... against that of a baseline microanneal
evidence.explanation: Shows the team ran ablation-style microanneals to assess candidate data sources.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: RULER was used to evaluate the OLMo 3 32B long-context Base checkpoint at 4K through 65K context lengths.

evidence.excerpt: RULER ... is a benchmark of synthetic long-context tasks
evidence.explanation: Identifies RULER as a long-context benchmark used for OLMo 3.
Table 12 reports OLMo 3 32B RULER scores across context lengths.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: RULER was the primary metric guiding long-context recipe development, including ablations of data choice, synthetic augmentation, document packing, attention scaling, and extension token budget.

evidence.excerpt: we use RULER as the primary metric to guide our long-context recipe development
evidence.explanation: Directly supports RULER as an ablation/development benchmark.

evidence.excerpt: Five key components of the Olmo 3 long-context extension recipe measured on the RULER benchmark.
evidence.explanation: Shows RULER was used in recipe ablations.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: HELMET was held out as an unseen long-context evaluation suite and used to report final OLMo 3 32B long-context performance.

evidence.excerpt: HELMET ... is a suite of long-context benchmarks ... We keep HELMET as an unseen evaluation suite
evidence.explanation: Directly identifies HELMET as a held-out evaluation suite for final checkpoints.

evidence.excerpt: HELMET (held-out eval)
evidence.explanation: Table 12 reports OLMo 3 32B results on the HELMET held-out evaluation.
